query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_risk_metrics AS
SELECT 
  1.23 AS sharpe,
  1.61 AS sortino,
  0.18 AS max_drawdown,
  0.14 AS volatility,
  0.025 AS var95,
  0.92 AS beta
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_risk_metrics AS
SELECT 
  1.23 AS sharpe,
  1.61 AS sortino,
  0.18 AS max_drawdown,
  0.14 AS volatility,
  0.025 AS var95,
  0.92 AS beta
